subcodes.first_line: O ye sons of the Kingdom! At a time when conditions were most difficult and oppressive and the reception of letters hard and impracticable… In the future, God willing, there will be erected throughout all the regions
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابناء ملکوت نامه شما رسید در وقتیکه حال صعب و عسیر بود و وصول نامه مشکل و مستحیل
subcodes.subjects: @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
